title: M@ro'dak #4757
definition:
Merodach-baladan = "Marduk has given a son"

 1) king of Babylon in the days of king Hezekiah of Judah
nasbUsage:
Definition: Merodach-baladan = "Marduk has given a son"

 1) king of Babylon in the days of king Hezekiah of Judah

    NASB:  a king of Bab. (the same as 1255)
